explanation: Raw FASTA residues are interpreted as amino acids rather than nucleotides.
IQ-TREE runs with -st AA, so model search and inference stay in amino-acid state space.
ModelFinder searches protein substitution models instead of nucleotide models.
The benchmark starts from protein FASTA directly and does not translate coding DNA.
GC content, codon position, and nucleotide substitution assumptions are not part of this workflow.
Bootstrap support values are estimated from the trimmed amino-acid alignment.
